name: Chinese Style Sauteed Firm Tofu
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Green bell peppers, thinly sliced
1 tsp Cornstarch dissolved in 3 tbsp water
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the firm tofu crosswise into pieces shaped like French-fried potatoes.
2. Heat a wok, coat with oil, and sprinkle with salt.
3. Add onion to the wok and stir-fry for about 30 seconds over high heat.
4. Reduce heat to medium-low; add mushrooms and stir-fry for about 30 seconds.
5. Lower the heat further; add carrot and green bell peppers, then tofu, each ingredient being stirred for approximately one minute.
6. Add sake, soy sauce, ginger, sugar, and water. Simmer for 3 to 4 minutes.
7. Stir in the dissolved cornstarch mixture (cornstarch mixed with 3 tbsp water) and continue simmering for an additional 30 seconds.
